title: Clock edges require 2 calls to step() in CXXRTL
body:
### Version

Yosys 0.37+21 (git sha1 8649e3066, clang 10.0.0-4ubuntu1 -fPIC -Os)

### On which OS did this happen?

Linux

### Reproduction Steps

Hi there!

I noticed wrong runtime values in some ~~asynchronous~~ cases. It may be because events are ignored (I am not yet familiar with CXXRTL internals at all, so it could be something completely different ^^).
[I created a dedicated repository](https://github.com/flaviens/cxxrtl-b4) with a very reduced case for you to try.

Please let me know if you need any more infomation.

Thank you!
Flavien 

### Expected Behavior

Output value 1

### Actual Behavior

Output value 0
